Careers

Join a fast-paced, innovative organization and make a difference. View our current job opportunities at GlobalMedic!

If you don’t see the position you were hoping for, but you think you would be a great fit for our organization please send your resume to hr@globalmedic.ca.

**Please be aware there have recently been postings for jobs in Ghana (and possibly other countries) impersonating GlobalMedic. Our only offices are in Canada and we only hire in the Toronto area. If you see a job posted online or on social media and it is not posted on this page, it is fraudulent.**
